text:
The Ekiga port net-im/ekiga
builds veresion 4.0.1 installs find the camera, but does not find ANY SOUND hardware, tested on 2 different notebooks
The camera can show an image, but there is NO SOUND

the ptlib package shows support for oss and the oss is working too

System is Freebsd 10.2 tested
